business_story: Arusuvai Cloud Kitchen started with a simple idea: to serve authentic South Indian meals cooked with the same care and love as home.
founder_story: Our founder, Priya, missed her mother's cooking when she moved to the city. She realized many others felt the same, and Arusuvai was born.
mission: To provide fresh, hygienic, and authentic homemade food to everyone.
vision: To be the most trusted name in homemade food delivery and catering.
